metadata.description: Structured reasoning skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: reasoning
plugins.description: Structured reasoning skills for Claude Code: atom-of-thought decomposes complex multi-part problems into independent and dependent sub-questions before answering; confess produces an honest audit of just-completed work, surfacing confidence levels, shortcuts, and unverified assumptions; postmortem turns a finished session into a root-cause analysis, a minimum-round-trip replay, and proposed fixes.
